# <!--name-->Check npm Version Published<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Check whether a package version is already available on npm.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name           | Description                | Required | Default |
|----------------|----------------------------|----------|---------|
| `package-name` | npm package name.          | `true`   | ` `     |
| `version`      | Package version.           | `true`   | ` `     |
| `registry-url` | Optional npm registry URL. | `false`  | ` `     |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name                | Description                              |
|---------------------|------------------------------------------|
| `already_published` | true when package@version exists on npm. |
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/check-npm-version-published" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Check whether version is already published"

```

<!--/usage-->
